[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0010000 1
2 0000110 2
3 0011001 3
4 1000001 2
5 0001000 1
6 0100000 1
7 0010001 2

01 1000111 4

67 0010100 2
70 1100110 4
